Internal memo — Singapore counsel — Confidential — DocRef: HPH—M&A—2 6 0 5 — s (v3)
Issuer: HarbourPeak Holdings Ltd. (Mainboard; SGX‑ST), project name: Pr o j e c t L a g u n a; target: CobaltGrid Pte. Ltd.
Contact: Ms. Janice Teo, General Counsel, janice.teo@harbourpeak.com.sg, +65 6991 0371.
Per our SGXNet announcement dated 12 Feb 2026 (Ref: HPH/ANN/2026/0212-001), the Board disclosed receipt of a non-binding indication from Azure Delta Capital regarding a potential strategic investment; that disclosure remains public.
As at 28 May 2026, we have received a firm, Board‑level conditional offer at S$1.42 per share for a 60% stake coupled with a placement; this is not generally available and is expected to be price‑sensitive under SGX‑ST L i s t i n g M a n u a l Rule 703(1).
Selective disclosure controls: do not brief analysts or major shareholders absent wall‑cross; execute NDAs for Vendor DD call at 15:00 SGT with BlueKite Partners and Osprey Ridge Fund; consider a trading halt prior to any SGXNet release if leak risk increases.
Closed‑window: applies per Company Securities Dealing Policy and SGX‑ST practice from 1 Jul 2026 until 2Q results (target 29 Jul 2026); no dealing by directors/connected persons.
Materiality: expected to add ~22% to consolidated EBITDA (issuer‑relative); likely to trip Rule 1006 thresholds but not a reverse takeover under Rule 1015; draft SIA states this does not constitute a material adverse change.
PDPA: limit sharing of employee transfer/retention lists to aggregated form; do not send NRIC scans; any onboarding data to be provided post‑signing with consent or PDPA exception justification.
SFA: remind insiders of s.218/219 prohibitions; add Mr. Rohan Malik to the insider list and circulate dealing blackout notice today.
Public information note: the 2023 Annual Report and 2019 trade‑press coverage of EcoFan v2 are public and not price‑sensitive; no SGXNet disclosure is required for those materials.
Non‑issuer noise: Seabright Logistics Ltd.’s Tuas warehouse upgrade is not issuer information and should not influence our disclosure analysis.
Timing: if the Board approves and signs a binding SPA, announcement must be made as soon as reasonably practicable via SGXNet; if negotiations become widely rumoured, submit a trading halt request to SGX‑ST immediately.
Already announced: the 7 Apr 2026 press release on the CityPower Utilities pilot is in the public domain and should not be treated as MNPI.
Working links: https://sgxnet.example.sg/annc?ref=HPHL%2F2026-05-28%2F0 0 5 9; internal D a t a R o o m — dr.harbourpeak.local/projects/Pr o j e c t-L a g u n a.
For queries: compliance@harbourpeak.com.sg; generic policy v2.1 applies; this memo is for internal legal/compliance purposes only and is not investment advice.
